title: MetalMax
description: This mod populates the Overworld with brutally challenging mutated monsters!
body:
Sick of an uneventful Overworld?

Want to spice up your survival challenge?

This mod might be your answer!

Face deadly mutated creatures and monsters that'll test your skills to the limit!"

## Monster
**This mod added monster are divided into two main categories:**
- Mechanical
- Bionic and Biological

**Mechanical:**
> Lower health, limited mobility.
> 
> Attacks with missiles, shells, etc.
> 
> Extremely high defense, but can be disabled or destroyed by specific methods.

**Bionic/Biological:**
> Higher health, highly agile.
> 
> Excels at charging maneuvers.
> 
> Vulnerable to fire and poison (takes 3× damage from these sources).
